EmailTemplate.name: Additional Information Required
EmailTemplate.subject: Canaccede - In the Matter of Estate Number "{!Insolvency__r.Name}" and Account Number: "{!Insolvency_Account__c.Name}"
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Sir / Madam,
As you are aware, Canaccede International Management Ltd is processing {!pocPackage.Client_Company_Name__c} insolvent accounts.
Please be advised that {!pocPackage.Client_Company_Name__c} is not able to locate the debtor, please provide us with the account #, VIN and/or SIN #.
If any errors occurred in the transmission of the attachment, please contact Canaccede at; Email: {!pocPackage.CFG_Office_Email_Address__c} Facsimile: 844-827.9220 Telephone: 844-827. 9222
Thank You, Canaccede Insolvency Processing
